news.t: Nokia upgrades ESpanix's IXP infrastructure to reduce energy consumption and complexity
Nokia and NL-ix deploy Deepfield for the largest IXP-based anti-DDoS protection for enterprises across Europe
DNEG Launches DNEG IXP, a New Division Providing Immersive Experiences & Direct-to-Brand Creative Solutions
Charts Suggest Communications Sector Is Headed Higher

holdings.infoBox: IXP is an equity ETF with a total of 94 individual holdings. The top holdings are Meta Platforms stock at 14.69%, Alphabet at 12.99%, Alphabet at 10.40%, SoftBank Group at 4.66%, and The Walt Disney Company at 4.54%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Comm Services ETF (IXP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of global communication services companies, drawn from 1,200 global stocks selected by S&P. IXP was launched on Nov 12, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
